title: Gayatri Mantra Sadhana
desc: Religious leaders and devotees come together to recite the holy Gayatri Mantra to invoke the spirit of devotion and seek the blessings of the Almighty.

title: Mahamrityunjaya Mantra Sadhana
desc: Chanting of the sacred Mahamrityunjaya Mantra, 108 times, beckoning divine grace and transcendental protection to maintain physical and mental well-being.

title: Prashnottaray
desc: A religious leader answers several significant questions explaining how spirituality can be implemented in one's everyday life.

title: Aastha Ki Dhara Ganga
desc: Watch travelogue of the divine journey of Ganga River.

title: Ramayan
desc: Rama, the brave prince of Ayodhya, sets out to rescue his wife Sita from an evil Ravana, facing an ultimate test of loyalty.

title: Mahabharat
desc: A dynastic struggle between the collateral branches of the Kuru clan, the Kauravas and Pandavas, for the throne of Hastinapur leads to the Kurukshetra War.

title: Jai Hanuman
desc: This is TV Show - Religious Category.

title: Shree Brahma Vishnu Mahesh
desc: The Hindu deities, Lord Brahma, Lord Vishnu and Lord Shiva, represent the creation, preservation and destruction of the universe respectively, to lead humanity to enlightenment.

title: Shri Krishna
desc: Lord Krishna grows up from being a naughty little child to being the prince of Mathura and Dwarka. He embarks on a number of adventures to fight and eradicate evil forces and provide justice to all.

title: Geet Ramayan
desc: A compilation of melodious and devotional songs depicting crucial events from the Hindu epic Ramayana is played back-to-back.

title: Aastha Ki Dhara Ganga
desc: Watch travelogue of the divine journey of Ganga River.
